---
title: "Chapter 6. Passive indexing and benchmarking"
summary: "This chapter will review a couple topics that are needed for this part of the book. This chapter is just mainly foundational knowledge and the part will discuss all of the different passive investing methods that you can use. The later parts will discuss topics of active investing."
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

## Objective

Draft Chapter 6 content before turning it into a TSX chapter page.

## Sections

### What passive indexing is

- What passive indexing is placeholder for Passive indexing and benchmarking.
- Add concrete definitions, formulas, and implementation notes in a later pass.

### Why benchmarking matters

- Why benchmarking matters placeholder for Passive indexing and benchmarking.
- Add concrete definitions, formulas, and implementation notes in a later pass.

### Active vs passive

- Active vs passive placeholder for Passive indexing and benchmarking.
- Add concrete definitions, formulas, and implementation notes in a later pass.

### Tracking error

- Tracking error placeholder for Passive indexing and benchmarking.
- Add concrete definitions, formulas, and implementation notes in a later pass.

### Fees, taxes, and implementation frictions

- Fees, taxes, and implementation frictions placeholder for Passive indexing and benchmarking.
- Add concrete definitions, formulas, and implementation notes in a later pass.
